zh.Mildenhall, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanne Dobson於1510年出生在英國素福爾可米爾登哈爾時，她的父親John Dodson20歲，母親Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White15歲。她於1528年與Sir Robert Powell在英國素福爾可哈德利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1590年3月6日在英國素福爾可巴頓 米爾斯享年80歲，埋葬在英國越可爾哈利法可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanne Dobson于1510年出生在英国素福爾可米爾登哈爾时，她的父亲John Dodson20岁，母亲Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White15岁。她于1528年与Sir Robert Powell在英国素福爾可哈德利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1590年3月6日在英国素福爾可巴頓 米爾斯享年80岁，埋葬在英国越可爾哈利法可。

nameMeanings.name: Dobson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Dob(b), a rhyming pet form of Robert (see Dobbe ), + -son.

variants.name: Robert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Gilles, Normand, Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Michel, Edouard, Gaston, Yves.

French, Walloon, English, German, Dutch, Flemish, and Breton (of French origin); Hungarian (Róbert): from the ancient Germanic personal name Ro(d)bert (Middle English Robert, Old French Ro(d)bert), composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This is found occasionally in Anglo-Saxon England before the Conquest, but in the main it was introduced into England by the Normans and quickly became popular among all classes of society. Pet forms and diminutives are found from an early date, Robin being particularly common. Compare Robair , Robar , Robare , and Rober .
In some cases also an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Dopson
meanings: English (Surrey, Hampshire, Berkshire, and Middlesex): variant of Dobson with devoicing of -b- to -p- before -s-.

nameMeanings.name: Johanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joanne
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanne Dobson was born in 1510, in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, her father, John Dodson, was 20 and her mother, Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White, was 15. She married Sir Robert Powell in 1528, in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 6 March 1590, in Barton Mills, Suffolk, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanne Dobson est née en 1510, à Mildenhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Dodson, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Powell en 1528, à Hadleigh, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mars 1590, à Barton Mills, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanne Dobson 1510 in Mildenhall, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Dodson 20 und ihre Mutter Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White 15. Sie hat 1528 in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England Sir Robert Powell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. März 1590 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Barton Mills, Suffolk, England und wurde in Halifax, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanne Dobson è nata il nel 1510 nel Mildenhall, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Dodson, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Powell nel 1528, nel Hadleigh, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 6 marzo 1590, nel Barton Mills, Suffolk, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Halifax, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanne Dobsonが1510年にイギリススフォルクミルデンハルで生まれた時，父John Dodsonは20歳，母Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot Whiteは15歳であった。1528年にイギリススフォルクハドレイグでSir Robert Powellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1590年3月6日にイギリススフォルクバートン ミルズで80歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanne Dobson(이)가 1510년 영국 수폴크 미데홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Dodson(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1528년 영국 수폴크 하들리에서 Sir Robert Powell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1590년 3월 6일 영국 수폴크 바턴 미스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanne Dobson nasceu em 1510, em Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Dodson, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Powell em 1528, em Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de março de 1590, em Barton Mills, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanne Dobson родилась в 1510 г. в местности маилденолл, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Dodson было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Powell в 1528 г. в местности хадлиг, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 6 марта 1590 г. в местности бартон миллс, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanne Dobson nació en 1510, en Mildenhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Dodson, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agneta "Agnes" Alice Richards Of Marriot White, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Powell en 1528, en Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 6 de marzo de 1590, en Barton Mills, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
